author: Murat
description: One-click selectable preview PDF export for Obsidian mobile and desktop. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Murat / Codex
manifest.description: One-click selectable preview PDF export for mobile and desktop.
manifest.name: Mobile PDF Exporter

name: Mobile PDF Exporter

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fixes live DOM PDF pagination and rendering fidelity.

- Keeps editing-view exports on the real CodeMirror and NoteDraw DOM.
- Reassembles virtualized reading content from stable renderer sections so long quotes, tables, and headings do not disappear or repeat.
- Removes duplicate ghost text, page-boundary clipping, and trailing blank pages.
- Preserves selectable text, clickable internal/external links, canvas overlays, and existing PDF layout options.
releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.63

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.62

- Rebuilt on top of the 0.3.61 rollback baseline.
- Fixes Editing view exports losing long quotes or off-screen text by exporting a complete editor-source text model instead of the virtualized CodeMirror viewport.
- Improves Reading view capture by sampling the live preview while scrolling, reducing missed lazy-rendered content.
- Snaps page breaks to text-line boundaries and ignores non-content background/keep boxes for page height to reduce clipped text, duplicate boundary text, and trailing blank pages.

Local verification before release:
- Installed and reloaded in E:/note/.obsidian/plugins/mobile-pdf-exporter as 0.3.62.
- Editor-source long-quote probe: 96 quote markers present, 0 blank pages, 0 split text lines, 0 adjacent duplicates, external/internal links present.
- Reading-view active-note probe: 0 blank pages, 0 split text lines, 0 adjacent duplicates.
- Tests: node --test tests/*.test.mjs, tsc --noEmit, production build, node --check main.js.
releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.62

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.61

- Fixes editing-view PDF exports that could produce leading/trailing blank pages.
- Fixes repeated, offset, ghosted text caused by stitching CodeMirror virtual-scroll segments.
- Editing view now exports the current visible editor frame directly; Reading view remains the full-document export path.

Release assets: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.
releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.61

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Community review cleanup release. Standard release assets only.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 0.3.59

- Fixes Markdown table layout, cell styling, wrapping, alignment, and pagination.
- Preserves common rendered Markdown styling, including bold, italic, strikethrough, colors, highlights, inline code, tags, links, quotes, callouts, lists, tasks, code blocks, math/SVG, and embeds.
- Keeps short images together when possible and slices tall images continuously across pages without squeezing or repeating sections.
- Adds current-note-folder export, headers and footers, margins, scale, orientation, paper size, color mode, and reusable last-export settings.
- Defaults new installations to selectable/editable text PDF, 3x image quality, opening the exported PDF, and reusing the last export options.
- Fixes Chinese, English, number, and punctuation rendering/copying in selectable-text PDFs.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Restores the two embedded support QR images in the plugin settings while keeping the embedded CJK font subset out of the startup bundle.

This keeps the mobile-loading fix from 0.3.53, and verifies the QR images are not the iPhone/iPad startup blocker.

Assets:

- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Mobile loading compatibility release.

- Reduces startup `main.js` from the 0.3.52 size range back to about 1.6 MB.
- Removes the embedded CJK font subset and embedded support QR images from the startup bundle.
- Keeps standard Obsidian release assets only: `manifest.json`, `main.js`, and `styles.css`.
- Note: selectable/copyable CJK text may require a local font file (`fonts/NotoSansSC-Regular.otf` or `fonts/SimHei.ttf`). This release prioritizes iPhone/iPad plugin loading verification first.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: Stable community-review baseline based on 0.3.36. Standard release assets only.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Community review fixes for the initial plugin-market submission.

- Removes the redundant product name from the manifest description.
- Replaces the unsupported language API usage with browser/system locale detection for Auto language.
- Replaces direct style assignments flagged by the reviewer with Obsidian-compatible style helpers.
- Keeps the bilingual export UI and standard PDF font fallback from 0.3.35.

This release attaches only the standard community plugin assets: manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
- Adds Auto / Chinese / English interface language settings.
- Localizes the export ribbon tooltip, command name, file/editor menu item, export options panel, settings, export prompt, and main notices.
- Cleans the README so the primary English usage flow does not show abrupt Chinese button names.
- Falls back to a standard PDF font when the optional CJK font asset is unavailable, improving direct community-browser install compatibility for English/Latin notes.
- Includes direct `manifest.json`, `main.js`, and `styles.css` release assets for Obsidian community-plugin review, plus the full manual ZIP with fonts and extras.
releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.35

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
- Shows the export prompt before starting the PDF export work.
- Simplifies the completed export prompt text.
- Includes the recent NoteDraw current-screen overlay support, Excalidraw export speed improvements, output-folder placement, and export performance optimizations since 0.3.29.
releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.34

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
## Changes

- Keeps the standard Obsidian plugin layout with a single `main.js`; no extra PDF dependency chunk is required.
- Reduces `main.js` from about 12.9 MB to about 1.6 MB by removing the embedded Noto Sans SC base64 font.
- Loads the PDF runtime and Chinese font only when an export starts.
- Avoids startup render-root DOM cleanup work.

## Package

- `mobile-pdf-exporter-v0.3.29.zip`
- SHA256: `72B42CAA3D3164D52B01B04B5FF6BE0BC319708ED6F6B0BA56563496C430CF54`

## Verification

- `npm run build`
- `npx tsc --noEmit`
- Single-`main.js` package check: no `pdf-deps.js`
- Startup smoke test: requiring `main.js` does not require the PDF runtime
- Isolated PDF/font smoke test passed
releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.29

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
- Adds editable PDF filename field in the export toolbar.
- Moves export status to a compact top bar and removes center prompts/progress UI.
- Keeps the top export toolbar background fixed without scroll gaps.
- Improves current-screen Note Doodle export for reading and editor/source views by using the visible live canvas when available.
- Keeps hidden doodles out of the PDF and preserves the selectable preview PDF route.
- Release ZIP includes standard Obsidian plugin files plus release-only support QR assets under extras/.

releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.27

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
- PDF 导出入口现在先打开常规导出选项面板，再由用户确认导出。
- 面板支持导出模式、页面大小、方向、彩色/灰度、边距、内容缩放、图片 PDF 分辨率、标题、输出目录、导出后打开/分享，以及保存为默认值。
- 保留 0.3.15 的导出引擎，不包含 0.3.16 的手机悬浮按钮。

- Adds a plugin setting to turn the mobile floating export button on or off.
- Keeps ordinary note PDF options from 0.3.15: page size, orientation, color/grayscale, selectable text PDF, image PDF, margin, content scale, and image-PDF resolution.

- Does not include the 0.3.16 mobile floating PDF button.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
## 0.3.13

- Embedded the Noto Sans SC fallback font into main.js so standard Obsidian community-plugin installs do not need extra font files.
- Published standard Obsidian release assets: manifest.json, main.js, and styles.css.
- Manual ZIP includes ready-to-use plugin files and optional support files under support/; support files are intentionally not stored in the source repository or README.
- Keeps the 0.3.12 Excalidraw large drawing export and PNG-too-large warning avoidance behavior.

releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter 0.3.13

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
## Mobile PDF Exporter v0.3.12

- Avoids Excalidraw `createPNG` first when SVG export is available, so successful large drawing exports should not show PNG-too-large notices.
- Rasterizes Excalidraw SVG internally with canvas size limits before building the sliced image PDF.
- Keeps low-resolution PNG fallback only if the SVG route fails or is unavailable.
- Keeps v0.3.11 large drawing slicing behavior.

SHA256: EDA90CF600D11A44B8836AAB7FDEEA2F27108111142E5189E294FDD4C57392A3
releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter v0.3.12

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
## Changes

- Waits for embedded previews and dynamic task blocks before measuring the export DOM.
- Tightens separator and unsupported emoji handling to reduce oversized spacing.
- Keeps selectable PDF text while preserving link colors, task markers, bullets, and lightweight preview decorations.
- Adds PDF URI link annotations for external links.
- Improves proportional image drawing and page-break avoidance for images and preview blocks.

## Package

This public release asset intentionally excludes `fonts/SimHei.ttf` and bundles `fonts/NotoSansSC-Regular.otf` instead.
releases.name: Mobile PDF Exporter v0.3.7

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Packaged Obsidian Mobile PDF Exporter v0.3.2.

- One-click preview-style PDF export.
- Phone-width layout for mobile reading.
- Selectable/copyable PDF text.
- Includes Noto Sans SC font for public distribution.

Install by extracting the ZIP into: <vault>/.obsidian/plugins/mobile-pdf-exporter/
releases.name: v0.3.2
